title: I Wanna Be Sedated
meaning_summary: I Wanna Be Sedated remains commercially useful because it still works as a recognizable catalog song for streaming, memory, and rediscovery.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming and playlist use keep the core songs active.
Live-culture recognition and sync use can renew demand.
Long-tail fan discovery supports recurring earnings beyond release cycles.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: I Wanna Be Sedated is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
